title: Column Title Translation Functionality
excerpt: We have team members who use Moday in different languages. The Column Titles enable only one language with no option of translation (you can put a description, but that isnt fully visible and useable with different proce…

posts.author: chaimg (Chaim Gelber)
posts.cookedHtml:
We have team members who use Moday in different languages. The Column Titles enable only one language with no option of translation (you can put a description, but that isnt fully visible and useable with different processes and if you have multiple languages).

It would be great to have the avility to give column titles additional names for different languages.
